verses.text: David' tapa, Israel kumpi Solomon' paunakte
Mite in pilna leh thuhoihte a phawk theihna ding, khiatna thuk a nei kammalte a theih theihna ding
A hoihin a pil gamtat theihna ding, thuman, thutang, a kilawmin a gamtat theihna ding
Thuthei nailote in a theihna ding, khangnote in pilna leh thu ngaihsut theihna a ngahna ding
Mi ciimsate ciimsak semsemin, mi pilsate pilsak semsemin
paunakte leh thugentehnate hoihtakin thei-in, mipilte' kampau leh a thugente uh a theihna ding ahi hi.
Topa zahtakna in pilna kipatna hi a, mihaite in pilna leh thuhilhna donlo uh hi
Ka ta aw, na pa' hong thuhilhna hoihtakin zui in la, na nu' hong thugente ngai in
Tua thuhilhnate in na gamtat hong hoihsak ding a, kizepna lukhu leh kizepna khi bangin hong etlawmsak ding hi
Ka ta aw, mi hoihlote in nang hong zol ciangin, amau' zolna zui kei in
Amaute in, “Hong pai in, mi khatpeuh va that ni! Mi ommuang khat va muan'suam ni
I muh tungin a cidam, a hing kimlai hinapi, i suk khit ciangin a sisa hi ding
Na a manpha a namkimin i sut ding a, tua bang nate i inn dimin i nei ding hi
Kote tawh hong kipawl lecin, i ngah khempeuh i hawm ding hi,” hong cih uh hangin ut kei in
Ka ta aw, tua bang mite tawh kikhawl kei in la, amaute kiang panin kihemkhia in
Amaute a sia-in gamta nuam vanvan uh a, mi thah ding lamsang haksa sa hetlo uh hi
I matnop vasate' muhtangpi-in, i siahna ngenthang zaak leeng a mawkna ahi hi
Ahi zongin mite in amau' awkna ding mah thang siah uh a, kuamah dang awkloin, amau mah hai awk uh hi
Zawhthawh thu tawh mi' na a sutte in sihlawh tawntung zaw a, hih bangin a gamtate in tua bangmah tuak ngitnget hi.
Ngai in! Kongzing lampi leh van kizuakna phualpi-ah pilna hong kiko hi
Khuapi kulhkongpi tual leh mi a kikhopna mun khempeuhah nakpi takin hong awngkhia a
“Mihaite aw, bang tanvei hai omom nuam na hi uh hiam? Bang tanvei pilna thudon loin om ding na hi uh hiam? Pilna ngaihsutin nei ngeilo ding na hi uh hiam
Kong thuhilhna hong ngai un; ka ngaihsutna kong gen ding a, ka theihna kong zasak ding hi
Keimah in note hong samsam napi-in nong ngai nuam kei uh a, ka khut hong vanvan napi-in kuamah in nong thudon kei uh hi
Ka thugente khempeuh hong thudon loin, kong tainate khempeuh hong mang nuamlo na hih manun
lungkhamna na tuah uh ciangin kong nuihsan lel ding a, launa na tuah uh ciangin kong thusim kei ding hi
Lungkhamna in huihpi' nawk bangin note hong nawkgawpin, pingpei' pei bangin note hong peigawpin, lungkhamna leh sinkhamna na tuah uh ciangin kong don kei ding hi
Tua bang hun ciangin kei nong sam ding uh a, ahi zongin kong dawng kei ding hi. Limtakin kei nong zong ding uh a, ahi zongin koimahah nong mu kei ding uh hi
Note in pilna na deih kei uh a, Topa na zahtak nuam kei uh hi
Ka thugente na deih kei uh a, kong thuhilhna ngai nuamlo na hih manun
na gamtatna bangun na thuak ding uh a, nomau' gamtatna mah in note hong gimsak ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh thu theilote in pilna a donloh manun sihlawh uh a, mihaite in lunghihmawhna a neihloh manun siatlawh uh hi
Ahi zongin ka thugenna a ngaite in lungnopna ngah ding uh a, launa neilo-in nuamtakin om hithiat ding uh hi,” a ci hi.
